title: UAE launches first retail T-Sukuk, letting residents invest in government-backed assets from Dh1,000
summary_full: UAE residents can now invest in government-backed Islamic Treasury Sukuk with a minimum of Dh1,000, thanks to the launch of the Sovereign Retail T-Sukuk programme. This Shariah-compliant product, developed with the Central Bank, aims to boost savings and financial inclusion by offering individuals direct access to sovereign investment opportunities previously reserved for institutions.
